interactions.raw_notes: Devon caught Immad Akhund's panel on banking-as-a-service. Brief expo-floor chat — Immad shared they were finalizing the Series C and not opening allocation. Polite handshake; said keep in touch.

interactions.subject: Mercury investor update — Q4 2021
interactions.raw_notes: Standard quarterly update sent to broad investor list (Renegade on the cc as a prospective LP/co-investor from prior intro). Highlighted profitability path. Devon replied with kudos; no diligence opened.

interactions.author: maya@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Mercury reported profitable, no new raise. Horizontal startup banking — adjacent at best to Renegade thesis. Sourcing this through Coatue's secondary market just to track price discovery — no action.

interactions.author: devon@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Mercury personal banking launch is interesting consumer extension; doesn't change our thesis fit (we focus on workflow-critical and dual-use industrials, not consumer/horizontal banking). Keeping on tracked list for benchmarking only.
